ops.title: Pass I: HTML strip pass (markup_strip.rs, ref-backed, HTML-only v1)
ops.description: Hand-rolled looks_like_html + strip_html (~120 lines, strict bail-outs → None, never a bad strip; reject <?xml; script/style/comments dropped wholesale; entities decoded). Ref-backed via ref_recode. Chain position F→D→E→I→A. Markdown stripping explicitly out of scope for v1 (user decision). Plan: two-notes-shimmying-zephyr Phase 1.

ops.text: markup_strip_* tests green: HTML fixture stripped ref-backed with original recoverable, no-ops on source code/JSON/XML, bail-out on unterminated tag
presets deterministic chain updated to F→D→E→I→A→B→C→J with doc
